{{Quote|It's as dead as the rest of Kejim.|[[Kyle Katarn]]|audio=DeadKejim.flac|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''</ref>}}
[[File:Kejim_Post.png|thumb|left|150px|A schematic outline of the base.]]
The '''Kejim Outpost''' was an [[Imperial Remnant]] research lab on the planet [[Kejim]]. The outpost was used to perform experiments intending to infuse select [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] with [[Artusian crystal]]s, resulting in the [[Reborn]]. This outpost was commanded by the [[Imperial Remnant]] officer [[Stavan]] and garrisoned with around 140 personnel.<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast" />

[[File:BridgesOverTheOutpostKejim-JO.png|thumb|left|150px|left|These bridges were destroyed during the mission.]]
Thought to be abandoned, [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jan Ors]] went to scout the area, but [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] played a transmission intercepted from the outpost which confirmed Imperial activity. During the subsequent [[Mission to Kejim|mission]], much of the outpost's staff was killed, and the base suffered considerable damage in some areas.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}}
